statusLine.command: jq -r 'def bar: (.context_window.used_percentage // 0) as $p | (($p / 5) | floor) as $filled | (20 - $filled) as $empty | "\("█" * $filled)\("░" * $empty)"; if (.context_window.used_percentage // 0) > 80 then "[\(.model.display_name)] ⚠️  \(.context_window.used_percentage)% [\(bar)] — RUN /compact NOW" elif (.context_window.used_percentage // 0) > 60 then "[\(.model.display_name)] \(.context_window.used_percentage)% [\(bar)]" else "[\(.model.display_name)] \(.context_window.used_percentage)% [\(bar)]" end'

hooks.command: bun run format || npm run format || true
